skill.core.pathfinding.description.advan:
{Advanced Pathfinding}

Advanced Pathfinding reduces the movement penalty for rough terrain, reducing the cost of moving by 50% to a minimum cost of 90%.
skill.core.pathfinding.description.basic:
{Basic Pathfinding}

Basic Pathfinding reduces the movement penalty for rough terrain, reducing the cost of moving by 25% to a minimum cost of 95%.
skill.core.pathfinding.description.exper:
{Expert Pathfinding}

Expert Pathfinding removes the movement penalty for rough terrain, reducing the cost of moving by 75% to a minimum cost of 85%.
